chunks.title: Guest Editors' Foreword
chunks.text:
<!-- image -->

## Journal of Graph Algorithms and Applications

http://jgaa.info/ vol. 24, no. 2, pp. 63-64 (2020)

DOI: 10.7155/jgaa.00518

## Special Issue on Selected Papers from the 13th International Workshop on Algorithms and Computation (WALCOM 2019) Guest Editors' Foreword

Krishnendu Mukhopadhyaya 1 Shin-ichi Nakano 2

1 Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata, India 2 Gunma University, Kiryu, Japan This special issue of Journal of Graph Algorithms and Applications (JGAA) is dedicated to selected papers presented at the 13th International Workshop on Algorithms and Computation (WALCOM 2019) held during February 27-March 02, 2019 at Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati), India.

WALCOM is an annual conference series on all aspects of algorithms and computation and WALCOM 2019 marked the 13th successful organization of this event. In WALCOM 2019, 30 high quality papers were selected from 100 submission based on through reviewing by independent experts followed by indepth discussion sessions by the Program Committee.

As per the tradition of WALCOM, the proceedings of WALCOM 2019 were published at Volume 11355 of the LNCS series of Springer in 2019. Extended and revised versions of three top quality papers of WALCOM 2019 have been considered for inclusion in this special issue based on their merits and relevance to JGAA. The invited papers have been rigorously reviewed following the standard refereeing process of JGAA. This special issue contains three very high quality papers covering diverse topics in Graph Algorithms and Applications.

We would like to express our sincere gratitude to the authors for contributing their high-quality papers, to the reviewers for their excellent work that led to further improvements, and to the Editors of the Journal of Graph Algorithms and Applications for making this special issue possible. We believe that this special issue will be interesting to the readership of JGAA and will spark future works.
